name: Zynga Inc.
description: Zynga is a global leader in interactive entertainment with a mission to connect the world through games and is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. With massive global reach in more than 175 countries and regions, the company's diverse portfolio of popular game franchises has been downloaded more than 10 billion times on mobile. Founded in 2007, Zynga is headquartered in California and maintains locations across North America, Europe, and Asia, continuing to develop some of the world's most popular social games played by millions of people daily.
